channel.title: About Me on James Jarvis
channel.description: Recent content in About Me on James Jarvis

item.title: 🤔 Reflecting on 3 months living and working in Singapore
item.description: What I learned from my time working and living in the city-state of Singapore

item.title: 📉 Inflation adjusted net worth/salary spreadsheet
item.description: Money ain’t what it used to be

item.title: 🤔 Setting up for a Mini Sabbatical
item.description: Preparing for 117 days living, working and travelling in South East Asia

item.title: 📚 Year of books
item.description: 2023 was a year of reading

item.title: 📖 Blogging Site
item.description: Owning my place on the internet, like the good old days

item.title: 24 Years Old
item.description: From 23rd June 2022 to 23rd June 2023. This year has been an unfortunate reset.

item.title: 23 Years Old
item.description: From 23rd June 2021 to 23rd June 2022. As the world slowly started to shake off the pandemic I decided to move to London with Konrad.

item.title: 22 Years Old
item.description: From 23rd June 2020 to 23rd June 2021. First year in full time work (at a smol company called ThoughtMachine) and first year I missed a few days filming!

item.title: ⠪ Mapping the Internet, part deux
item.description: Links on links on links with a UI, man

item.title: :map: Visualising location history
item.description: Where did he come from, where did he go?

item.title: ⠪ Mapping the Internet (?)
item.description: Links on links on links, man

item.title: 👨‍🎓 Graduating in a Pandemic/Recession
item.description: Well, that was underwhelming…

item.title: 21 Years Old
item.description: From 23rd June 2019 to 23rd June 2020. Waved goodbye to Cali, met the fam in Florida.

item.title: :umbrella: E-Ink Weather Dashboard
item.description: Fun little rarely updating dashboard.

item.title: 📸 Indoor Garden Timelapse
item.description: Watching plants grow

item.title: 📦 IPFS Web Hosting
item.description: I thought IPFS was supposed to be permament…

item.title: 🍲 Risotto Play
item.description: Online playground for a useless programming language

item.title: 🦠 COVID-19 (Coronavirus) automatic predictions
item.description: Learning about pandas

item.title: 📈 Graphing Monzo Growth
item.description: Finally, a bank people don’t hate

item.title: :lightning: Automated speedtest internet monitoring
item.description: How to check if your broadband provider is lying to you

item.title: 📆 WhatsUpKent: Everything happening at the University of Kent
item.description: Finding out better lectures than the ones I was paying for

item.title: 20 Years Old
item.description: From 23rd June 2018 to 23rd June 2019. I moved to California for a year to pursue my dreams of Silicon Valley.

item.title: :pen: Git Art
item.description: Commit stuff, with style

item.title: 🖥 Open Source Portfolio Website
item.description: I wanted a personal website, I made a personal website.

item.title: 🎵 Musish: The Unofficial, Open Source Apple Music Web Player
item.description: How I was kinda developer-famous for 5 minutes

item.title: 19 Years Old
item.description: From 23rd June 2017 to 23rd June 2018. My second year of university, I was on the committee of both sailing and travel societies, I got some exciting job offers, ended a relationship and I said some sad goodbyes before my year in California!

item.title: 18 Years Old
item.description: From 23rd June 2016 to 23rd June 2017. I didn’t manage to film every day, but I’m so glad I started this, and I don’t plan on stopping any time soon.
